scripts.test:api: uv run --project apps/api pytest -c apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api/tests -q
scripts.lint:web: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter web typecheck
scripts.lint:api: uv run --project apps/api ruff format --check apps/api && uv run --project apps/api ruff check apps/api
scripts.format: prettier --write "apps/web/**/*.{js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,json}" "docs/**/*.md" "*.{json,yaml,yml,md}" && uv run --project apps/api ruff format apps/api
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "apps/web/**/*.{js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,json}" "docs/**/*.md" "*.{json,yaml,yml,md}" && uv run --project apps/api ruff format --check apps/api
